Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Amending Trust So As To Remove It From Court Supervision And To Replace Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Scott Hodges (Trustee).
Baron Miller for and with Sidney Shaw.

Mr. Schultz stated that Mr. Hodges does not oppose. Mr. Miller stated that he is not aware of anyone opposing and that his Client does not oppose Mr. Hodges' request for a reserve. The Court granted the Petition for Order Amending Trust, etc. (order signed in open Court). Status on filing of Mr. Hodges final accounting is set for January 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Said accounting is to be submitted to the Court one week prior to the status hearing date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Jul-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sidney Shaw (Settlor of Trust) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Shaw stated that he has some serious objections to the accounting and that the Trustee and the Trustee's Attorney is not communicating with him. The Court explained that the Trustee's Atorney needs to be aware of what Mr. Shaw's objections are and continued the matter to July 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will advise Mr. Schultz.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
